name: npm-jar-e2e-consumer-tampered
description: Layer 2 e2e consumer (mismatch path). Identical project to test/e2e/consumer/ — the Layer 2 workflow runs `mode=update` to produce a real lockfile, mutates it (e.g., removes a known marker line), then runs `mode=check` against the mutated file and asserts exit 1 + a `::error file=` annotation. No committed golden: src/action/diff.ts is byte-exact and the lockfile's generated_at field varies per run, so the tampering MUST happen at workflow time against the just-produced lockfile, not against a static fixture.
